name: Very Moist Lemon Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Prepare the lemon Jello according to package instructions using cold water.
3. In a large bowl, combine the cake mix, beaten eggs, oil, and lemon extract until well blended.
4. Pour in the prepared lemon Jello mixture and stir until combined.
5. Pour batter into greased 9-inch round cake pan.
6. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown and firm to touch.
7. Allow cake to cool completely before removing from pan.
